name: vun-skill-pack
description: Security review skills: map attack surface, trace data flows, and document findings.

skills.name: scan
skills.description: Full security review of a path or codebase.

skills.name: recon
skills.description: Map the attack surface of a path without diving deep.

skills.name: trace
skills.description: Follow one piece of untrusted input to where it lands.

skills.name: vuln
skills.description: Check for a specific vulnerability class across the codebase.

skills.name: finding
skills.description: Format the current finding into a structured report card.
